zh.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun是Adam IV de Melun和Jeanne de Sully的兒子，於大約1295年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。他於大約1316年與Jeanne de Tancarville結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun是Adam IV de Melun和Jeanne de Sully的儿子，于大约1295年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。他于大约1316年与Jeanne de Tancarville结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a producer of melons (Spanish melón, French melon).

Spanish (Melón): habitational name principally from the town of Melón in Ourense (Galicia) or Melón in Vigo (also in Galicia). This is probably a topographic name (meaning ‘altitude, rock’), a word of pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Mellon
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulan in Seine-et-Oise, now known as Meulan-en-Yvelines.
Scottish (Lanarkshire; of Norman origin): variant of   Melville  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun was born about 1295, in Paris, Île-de-France, France as the son of Adam IV de Melun and Jeanne de Sully. He married Jeanne de Tancarville about 1316. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He was buried in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun est né environ 1295, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, fils de Adam IV de Melun et Jeanne de Sully. Il a épousé Jeanne de Tancarville environ 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Ilenterré à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun wurde um 1295 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Adam IV de Melun und Jeanne de Sully geboren. Er hat um 1316 Jeanne de Tancarville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er wurde in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun è nato il circa 1295 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Adam IV de Melun e Jeanne de Sully. Lui sposato Jeanne de Tancarville circa 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Fu sepolto a Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean De Melunは約1295年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでAdam IV de MelunとJeanne de Sullyの息子として生まれた。約1316年にJeanne de Tancarvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼はフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun(은)는 대략 1295년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Adam IV de Melun(와)과 Jeanne de Sully의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1316년 Jeanne de Tancarville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Paris, Île-de-France, França filho de Adam IV de Melun e Jeanne de Sully. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Tancarville aproximadamente 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele foi sepultado em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun родился около 1295 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Adam IV de Melun и Jeanne de Sully. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Tancarville около 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он был похоронен в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Jean De Melun nació aproximadamente 1295, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia como hijo de Adam IV de Melun y Jeanne de Sully. Se casó con Jeanne de Tancarville aproximadamente 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Fue sepultado en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.
